comment: 贴纸物品系列（sticker-items P2，docs/sticker-items-design.md §1.2）。kind=sticker 走绿幕抠图+白描边统一画风（ICON_STYLE_SUFFIX），id 与 items.ts renderRef 'sticker:<id>' 对应。

assets.prompt: a cheerful smiling sun with wavy rays
a cute pink daisy flower with a happy face center
a sparkling yellow five-pointed star with rosy cheeks
a small arched rainbow with fluffy clouds at both ends
a glossy red heart with a tiny highlight sparkle
a cute butterfly with big round patterned wings
a sleepy crescent moon with closed eyes and a nightcap
a fluffy white cloud with a gentle smiling face
a plump red strawberry with tiny seeds and a leafy top
a round yellow smiley face with big happy eyes
a small triangular pennant flag on a short pole
a cute red mushroom with white dots and a smiling stem
